title: Peaceful Depletion
description: Disabled the vanilla peaceful mode's automatic health and hunger regeneration mechanics.
body:
Peaceful Depletion

## Features - Removed the vanilla Peaceful mode's automatic health and hunger regeneration mechanics, and enabled starvation deaths even on Peaceful, Easy, and Normal difficulties. Additionally, when installed with the `Tough As Nails` mod, hydration regeneration will also be disabled in Peaceful mode.
